subcodes.first_line: A remembrance from the Wronged One unto him who hath acknowledged God and His signs which have filled the horizons. Rejoice in what [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: ذکر من لدی المظلوم لمن اعترف بالله و آیاته التی ملئت الافاق ان افرح بما
subcodes.subjects: @chastisement and requital, @presence of; reunion with God, @characteristics and conduct of true believers
